cast.name: Samantha Kelly
cast.character: Circus Singer Who Belts Like Norma Zimmer

cast.name: Kirk McGee
cast.character: Circus Singer Who Croons Like Perry Como

plot outline: After his parents' death, Jacob Jankowski is left penniless and homeless. Events lead him to joining the circus as their vet, working under their unstable boss August whose violent tendencies give everyone reason to be cautious around him, including his beautiful and quiet wife Marlena, whom August is very possessive of and who Jacob finds himself soon falling in love with.
title: Water for Elephants
akas: 恋人たちのパレード (Japan, Japanese title)
